context: Real conversation is messy and connected. You need fillers, opinions, and simple past forms to talk about your day and weekend naturally.
explanation: Use connectors to keep flow: porque, pero, entonces, tambien. Use opinion chunks: me gusta, no me gusta, prefiero, creo que. Add high-frequency past forms to tell short stories: fui, hice, tuve, vi.

examples.es: hoy trabaje, fui al gimnasio y cocine
examples.en: today I worked, went to the gym, and cooked

examples.es: fui a la playa y fue muy bien
examples.en: I went to the beach and it was very good

examples.es: creo que este restaurante es bueno, pero prefiero este
examples.en: I think this restaurant is good, but I prefer this one
I do not understand, can you repeat

examples.es: ayer fui al centro, despues vi a un amigo
examples.en: yesterday I went downtown, then I saw a friend
